description.ko: 심해의 고압적인 어둠 속에서 번성하는 생체 발광 생명체에 대한 평화로운 관찰입니다.
description.en: A peaceful observation of bioluminescent life thriving in the high-pressure darkness of the deep sea.

prompt: A cinematic wide shot of the deep ocean floor, titled 'The Hydrothermal Ballet.' A swarm of #40E0D0 turquoise bioluminescent jellyfish with long, translucent #48D1CC cyan filaments pulsate around #006994 mineral vents. The #000080 midnight water is thick with shimmering marine snow, while thermal light glows from the abyss. Photorealistic fluid dynamics, high-pressure deep sea atmosphere, 8k resolution, capturing a peaceful dance of transparent life in the midnight zone.
